name: AI Full-Stack Development
tagline: SaaS & Web Apps, 0 to 1 in Record Time
description: I build complete SaaS platforms and web apps from idea to deployment, using Claude Code, Cursor and Codex to move at a speed traditional teams can't match. Modern stacks (Next.js, React, Node.js, Python) with clean, maintainable code you actually own.

name: Mobile & Cross-Platform Apps
description: Native (Swift, Kotlin) and cross-platform (React Native, Flutter) apps, from UX to app-store launch. AI-assisted development means faster iterations and lower cost without cutting corners on quality.

name: Game Development
description: Web, mobile and casual games built with Unity, Godot, Cocos or pure HTML5/Canvas. From a quick playable prototype to a polished, shippable title — AI-assisted development keeps the timeline tight and the cost reasonable.

name: Browser Extension Development
description: MV3 browser extensions for Chrome and Edge — productivity tools, scrapers, automation and AI copilots. I handle the full path from prototype to store submission and review approval.

name: AI Apps & Agents
description: I integrate large language models into your product: chatbots, RAG knowledge systems, autonomous agents and tool-using workflows. From prompt design to production deployment with Claude, OpenAI and open models.

name: AI Workflows & Automation
tagline: Automate the Repetitive, Scale the Output
description: Content-generation pipelines, data-processing flows and end-to-end automations that remove repetitive manual work. I connect your tools, APIs and AI models into reliable workflows that run themselves.

name: Maintenance & Code Migration
description: Inherited a messy codebase? I take over legacy projects, upgrade frameworks, migrate tech stacks and pay down technical debt — keeping your product alive and moving while modernizing it underneath.

name: SEO & GEO Optimization
tagline: Rank on Google, Get Cited by AI
description: Traditional SEO plus Generative Engine Optimization — making your content discoverable by Google and citable by ChatGPT, Perplexity and AI search. Technical SEO, structured data, content strategy and measurable results.

name: AI Document Processing & Review
description: Batch document extraction, contract and content review, and knowledge-base construction powered by AI. Turn piles of PDFs, contracts and records into structured, searchable, actionable data.

name: AI Productivity Consulting
description: I help your team adopt Claude Code, Cursor and AI-assisted workflows — from setup and best practices to automated code review and custom agents. Grounded in 30 years of shipping real software.
